mapper.sql: id, user_id, title, description, attachment_url, due_date, priority, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (user_id, title, description, attachment_url, due_date, priority, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{dueDate}, IFNULL(#{priority}, 0), IFNULL(#{status}, 0), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE task SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM task WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
